key.name: icon-style
key.description: Icon style theme to use (original or gnome)

key.name: update-time
key.description: Time in seconds between updates (0 to disable)

key.name: show-brightness
key.description: Whether to show the brightness widget in the panel

key.name: brightness-profiles
key.description: Brightness profiles with brightness and gamma values

key.name: default-brightness-profile
key.description: Default brightness profile to use on startup

key.name: brightness-poll-interval
key.description: Time in seconds between brightness updates

key.name: show-brightness-in-panel
key.description: Display current brightness percentage in panel

key.name: show-obsidian
key.description: Whether to show the Obsidian widget in the panel

key.name: vault-search-paths
key.description: Directories to search for Obsidian vaults
